title: European Commission blocks Etraveli acquisition
description: EC prohibited Booking's €1.63B Etraveli takeover on conglomerate-effects grounds, its first such ban; Booking pledged to appeal.

title: Booking announces appeal of EC Etraveli decision
description: Booking Holdings issued statement intending to appeal the European Commission decision blocking the Etraveli Group acquisition.

title: Booking ramps buybacks; ~$6B repurchased in 2024
description: Booking Holdings returned capital via ~$6B in repurchases and $1.2B in dividends across 2024, alongside record revenues of $23.7B.

title: Agrees to acquire Etraveli Group for €1.63B
description: Booking Holdings agreed to acquire Etraveli Group from CVC Capital Partners for €1.63B to deepen flights ecosystem.

title: Strategic GenAI partnership with OpenAI
description: Booking.com publicly selected OpenAI as primary GenAI partner, integrating GPT with proprietary inventory and pricing data.

title: Smart Filter, Property Q&A, Review Summaries
description: Booking.com expanded AI feature suite in app to US/UK/AU/NZ/SG simplifying trip planning.

title: Ariane Gorin to succeed Peter Kern as CEO
description: Expedia Group announced CEO transition: Ariane Gorin to take over May 13, 2024; Peter Kern to remain Vice Chairman.

title: Cuts 9% of workforce (~1,500 roles)
description: Expedia laid off about 1,500 employees, primarily in Product & Technology, with $80-100M in restructuring charges.

title: Launches ChatGPT trip planner in app
description: Expedia debuted ChatGPT-powered in-app trip planner and an Expedia plugin for ChatGPT, an early industry GenAI launch.

title: Spring Release: Romie AI + 40 product updates
description: EXPLORE conference unveiled Romie virtual travel assistant, Creator Shops, and over 40 product enhancements.

title: Hong Kong secondary listing on HKEX
description: Trip.com Group completed secondary listing on Hong Kong Stock Exchange under code 9961, raising capital while maintaining Nasdaq ADRs.

title: Opens Middle East regional HQ in Dubai
description: Trip.com Group inaugurated Dubai regional office and signed partnerships with Saudi Tourism Authority and Qatar Tourism.

title: TripGenie + Wendao LLM unveiled
description: Trip.com revealed proprietary travel-trained Wendao LLM and upgraded TripGenie conversational AI assistant.

title: Completes acquisition of Travix for €142.5M
description: Trip.com Group acquired Dutch OTA Travix (CheapTickets, BudgetAir, Vayama, Vliegwinkel, Flugladen) to establish European foothold.

title: Acquires GamePlanner.AI for ~$200M
description: Airbnb's first public-company acquisition: bought Adam Cheyer-co-founded GamePlanner.AI to accelerate AI product roadmap.

title: Summer 2024 release introduces Icons
description: Airbnb launched Icons category - 11 once-in-a-lifetime experiences from celebrities/brands (Up house, Musée d'Orsay, Kevin Hart).

title: Summer 2025 release relaunches Experiences and Services
description: Airbnb relaunched Experiences in 650 cities and introduced new Airbnb Services with social features.

title: Expands into hotels, car rentals, AI host onboarding
description: Airbnb added boutique hotels, car rentals, airport transfers, grocery delivery and AI auto-fill listing tools.

title: Next-gen AI image enhancement deployed
description: Agoda rolled out Content Enhancement Tool to upscale and rerank 450M+ property images using ML.

title: Completes merger with ibibo Group (Goibibo)
description: MMT and Naspers/Tencent-owned ibibo (Goibibo, redBus) combined to form India's largest OTA platform; deal valued at ~$1.8-2.0B.

title: Extends share repurchase program to 2026
description: MMT extended share buyback authorization to March 2026 and removed per-share price cap.

title: OpenAI partnership announced
description: MakeMyTrip deepened AI-first strategy through OpenAI collaboration to power Myra conversational booking interface.

title: Takes steps toward Indian IPO
description: MakeMyTrip moving toward India IPO/dual listing as part of strategic repositioning, per Q4 FY26 earnings transcript.

title: Launches ChatGPT plugin
description: Kayak became a launch partner for OpenAI's ChatGPT plugin program with conversational flight/hotel/car search.

title: Traveloka 5.0 platform launch
description: Traveloka launched a major platform update with AI-driven search, expanded points system and AI-powered discovery feed.

title: Sustainable tourism filter rollout
description: Traveloka added carbon offset option and 'sustainable tourism' filter to its app to support ESG-oriented travelers.

title: General Atlantic majority stake acquisition
description: General Atlantic became majority owner of Czech flights OTA Kiwi.com in strategic growth investment.

title: Götz Reinhardt appointed CEO
description: Co-founder Oliver Dlouhý moved to Chief Strategy Officer/Exec Chairman; Götz Reinhardt named CEO to drive next growth phase.

title: Acquired by CVC Capital Partners for €508M
description: ProSiebenSat.1 sold Etraveli Group to CVC Capital Partners for €508M enterprise value.

title: KKR acquires significant minority stake
description: KKR took meaningful minority alongside CVC at €2.7B valuation (~38.7x 2024E EV/EBITDA).

title: Prime expands to Canada at 4M members
description: eDreams ODIGEO's Prime subscription expanded to Canada as the program crossed 4 million members.

title: Prime surpasses 5M members
description: eDreams ODIGEO's Prime subscription hit 5M members, calling itself the world's fastest-growing travel subscription.

title: Prime crosses 7M members milestone
description: eDreams ODIGEO's Prime subscription surpassed 7 million members, with 6.8M reached by Dec 2024.

title: Google Cloud GenAI partnership
description: eDreams ODIGEO joined Google Cloud's trusted-tester program to pilot generative AI across e-commerce flows.

title: $70M Series D led by Cool Japan Fund
description: Taiwan's KKday raised ~$70M Series D from Cool Japan Fund, NDF, ZUU & De Capital, CHBVC, Darwin Ventures for M&A and AI.

title: $210M Series E+ led by Bessemer
description: Klook closed $210M financing led by Bessemer Venture Partners with BPEA EQT, achieving first full-year profitability.

title: $100M growth round from Vitruvian Partners
description: Klook landed $100M from Vitruvian Partners to extend reach across APAC and attract younger travelers.

title: Files F-1 for NYSE IPO under ticker KLK
description: Klook Technology Ltd filed for US IPO with Goldman, JPM, Morgan Stanley as underwriters; 2024 revenue $417.1M.

title: GenAI partnership with Google Cloud
description: Klook tapped Google Cloud's PaLM 2 / Vertex AI for content localization across 10 languages and K.AI chatbot.

title: Deepens Google Cloud GenAI partnership
description: Klook expanded Google Cloud collaboration for shared AI infrastructure across content, K.AI and developer productivity.

title: Goibibo (ibibo Group) combines with MakeMyTrip
description: Naspers/Tencent's ibibo Group (Goibibo, redBus) agreed to combine with MakeMyTrip, creating India's largest OTA group.

title: Lists on BSE and NSE
description: EaseMyTrip listed at INR 212.25 on NSE (BSE: 543272 / NSE: EASEMYTRIP) after IPO subscribed 159x.

title: Acquires Spree Hospitality for INR 18.25Cr
description: EaseMyTrip acquired Spree Hospitality, a 1,200 room-keys hospitality management firm, to enter hotel operations.

title: Buys 49% of Pflege Home Healthcare
description: EaseMyTrip entered medical tourism, acquiring a 49% stake in Pflege Home Healthcare for INR 30 crore.

title: Nishant Pitti steps down as CEO
description: Co-founder Nishant Pitti resigned as CEO; Rikant Pittie took over while Nishant later became Chairman & MD.

title: Yatra Online lists on BSE/NSE
description: Yatra Online's INR 775 crore IPO priced at INR 142 was subscribed 1.61x and listed on Indian exchanges.

title: Acquires Globe Travels for INR 1,280M
description: Yatra Online agreed to buy Globe All India Services (Globe Travels) to deepen corporate-travel and MICE leadership.

title: Flipkart acquires Cleartrip 100%
description: Flipkart acquired 100% of Cleartrip valued at ~$40M during pandemic-driven distress sale.

title: Launches Out of Office (OOO) corporate travel
description: Cleartrip entered corporate travel management with OOO platform, onboarding 300 SMEs and 10 large enterprises at launch.

title: $1.7B SoftBank Vision Fund 2 investment
description: Yanolja raised $1.7B from SoftBank Vision Fund 2 at >10 trillion KRW (~$9B) valuation ahead of planned IPO.

title: Acquires 70% of Interpark e-commerce for ~$250M
description: Yanolja acquired 70% of Korean e-commerce pioneer Interpark for ~KRW 290B to build a travel super-app.

title: Yanolja Cloud acquires Israel's Go Global Travel
description: Yanolja's largest ever deal: Yanolja Cloud acquired B2B travel-tech firm Go Global Travel from Apax Mid-Market Israel.

title: Affiliate restructuring ahead of Nasdaq IPO
description: Yanolja announced consolidation/restructuring of affiliates to boost profitability before US listing targeted for late 2024-2025.

title: First Korean travel firm with ChatGPT Enterprise
description: Yanolja announced enterprise-wide adoption of OpenAI's ChatGPT Enterprise across operations.

title: $39M round from GS Retail, Mirae Asset, KDB
description: GC Company (Yeogi Eottae) raised $39M at >1.2 trillion KRW valuation, becoming a unicorn.

title: Acquires Japan's Loco-Partners (Relux) from KDDI
description: GC Company agreed to buy all shares of Loco-Partners, the operator of Japanese luxury travel platform Relux, from KDDI.

title: $500K investment from Startup Bangladesh Ltd
description: Bangladesh's ShareTrip raised $500K at $50M valuation from government-backed Startup Bangladesh Limited.

title: Priceline launches Penny Voice AI agent
description: Priceline rolled out voice-capable AI travel agent Penny enabling conversational real-time bookings.

title: Saudi Tourism Authority and Qatar Tourism MoUs
description: Trip.com Group inked global partnership with STA and Qatar Tourism alongside Dubai office launch.

title: Closes ~$200M share repurchase
description: MakeMyTrip's Class B shareholders (Trip.com/MIH Internet) sold shares back to the company in a $200M+ buyback.

title: Tainan City partnership with KKday and Klook
description: Tainan City Tourism Bureau partnered with Klook and KKday to roll out exclusive international traveler promotions.

title: Tainan City + KKday + Klook joint campaign
description: Tainan City Tourism Bureau partnered with KKday and Klook for international traveler promo codes from Aug 2023.

title: Brian Chesky outlines AI 'cross-vertical' vision
description: On Q4 2023 earnings, Chesky laid out AI-led plans to make Airbnb a cross-vertical company akin to Amazon/Apple.

title: Savvy Search GenAI app-exclusive launch
description: Skyscanner launched Savvy Search powered by OpenAI in AU, CA, IN, SG, UK and US travelers.

title: Launches Skyscanner ChatGPT app
description: Skyscanner's ChatGPT app launched in US/UK enabling natural-language flight search inside ChatGPT.

title: Launch partner for OpenAI Apps SDK
description: Expedia became launch partner for OpenAI Apps SDK, exposing Expedia search inside ChatGPT's 800M weekly user base.

title: OpenAI SME AI Accelerator program
description: Booking.com and OpenAI launched program to train 20,000 European SMEs in AI skills for productivity gains.

title: 2024 travel trends + AI revolution report
description: Trip.com Group released 2024 travel trends report highlighting AI revolution and sustainable journeys roadmap.

title: Envision 2024 Global Partner Conference
description: Trip.com hosted Envision 2024 outlining growth strategies including expansion in Greater China, MENA, SEA and AI focus.

title: Completes acquisition of Globe Travels
description: Yatra Online closed Globe Travels deal, gaining 360 corporate clients and ~$90M annual gross bookings.

title: Etraveli sale to Booking blocked by EC
description: EC blocked Booking's planned Etraveli acquisition, keeping Etraveli under CVC ownership.

title: Glenn Fogel appointed CEO
description: Glenn D. Fogel became President and CEO of (then) Priceline Group, later renamed Booking Holdings (Feb 2018).

title: Priceline Group renamed Booking Holdings
description: The Priceline Group officially changed its name to Booking Holdings, signaling reorientation around the Booking.com brand.

title: Bus reservations launched via Flipkart
description: Cleartrip and Flipkart launched bus ticket bookings via Flipkart app, expanding travel super-app push.

title: TripMoney + Cover Genius CFAR insurance
description: MakeMyTrip's fintech arm TripMoney partnered with Cover Genius (XCover) for 'Cancel For Any Reason' travel insurance.

title: AI travel assistant and trip-planning tools
description: Traveloka rolled out advanced trip-planning tools and AI travel assistants signaling early-2023 AI commitment.

title: Ctrip acquires Skyscanner for £1.4B
description: Trip.com Group's predecessor Ctrip acquired Skyscanner for ~£1.4B in Europe's largest travel-tech deal.

title: $200M Series E investment from BPEA EQT
description: Klook secured Series E from BPEA EQT to fund APAC growth and travel-experiences recovery.

title: AI Trip Planner launches in US app
description: Booking.com debuted its conversational AI Trip Planner beta to US travelers in the mobile app.

title: Expands Middle East partnerships
description: Trip.com signed additional Middle East tourism partnerships building on Dubai office and STA/Qatar MoUs.

title: Integration into MMT AI-first platform
description: Goibibo aligned product roadmap with parent MMT's AI-first strategy, integrating Myra/Gia-derived AI features.

title: Prepares Nasdaq/NYSE IPO with Goldman, MS
description: Yanolja selected Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley to lead its targeted US IPO at potential $7.5B+ valuation.

title: AI customer service agent reaches 50% of US
description: Airbnb confirmed AI customer service agent was live for half of US users with plans to expand to all by end of month.

title: Mastercard 'Lifestyle Navigator' partnership
description: Mastercard chose India and MakeMyTrip Myra to launch its global AI-powered concierge service.

title: Plans for K.AI conversational commerce
description: In IPO filings Klook outlined AI-powered conversational commerce roadmap pairing K.AI chatbot with shopping guides.

title: Triple-digit MENA booking growth disclosed
description: Trip.com Group disclosed >100% YoY booking growth into UAE and Saudi Arabia in Q1 2024 as part of MENA push.

title: K-culture tours target tripling foreign visitors
description: Yanolja unveiled K-culture inbound tour strategy aiming to triple foreign visitors to Korea via packaged experiences.

title: $500K seed to digitize Bangladesh travel
description: ShareTrip received $500K funding round to scale Bangladesh OTA platform and digitize the country's travel sector.

title: Second 2024 layoff round confirmed
description: Expedia confirmed an additional round of layoffs in 2024 on top of February's 1,500 cuts as it continued platform consolidation.

title: GC Company-Online Tour buyout deal
description: Buyout/LBO deal involving GC Company and Online Tour subsidiary completed in January 2025.

title: Acquires Getaroom for $1.2B from CVC
description: Booking Holdings agreed to acquire wholesale hotel distributor Getaroom for $1.2B, strengthening B2B accommodation supply.

title: Vitruvian Partners growth investment
description: Vitruvian Partners committed $100M to Klook to extend Asia-Pacific reach and target younger demographics.

title: Connected Trip platform vision unveiled
description: Booking.com formally articulated Connected Trip strategy uniting stays, flights, transport and attractions in a single app.
